reviews.review_description: YOU CAN'T PLAY IT DON'T GET IN MY TRY TO PUT IN A CODE AND I CAN'T DO NOT GET IT DO WASTE YOUR TIME ON IS GAME have a good day
I need a license WTF why is this on app lab

developer_response.body:
App Lab is a distribution platform, and it allows apps to have external subscription models.

As a reminder, NP Skills Labs is not a game, this is a clinical lab skills training application.

A license is required in order to use this app, a single-user license can be purchased at clinicimmersives.com
